template.template_excerpt:
# 11_ITEM_BY_ITEM_ANALYSIS

## KEYWORDS
`逐项分析` `按条分析` `条款对照` `item-by-item` `clause-by-clause` `requirement matrix` `资格 技术 商务 格式`

---

## TASK
Perform clause-by-clause analysis of bidding document: map each requirement to clause_id, chapter, category, mandatory flag, scoring link, and risk level.

## INPUT
- Bidding document (PDF/Word/Text) or structured analysis from 01_ANALYZE_BIDDING_DOCUMENT_V2

## OUTPUT
```json
{
  "summary": {
    "qualification_count": 0,
    "technical_count": 0,
    "commercial_count": 0,
    "format_count": 0,
    "mandatory_count": 0,
    "scoring_linked_count": 0
  },
  "items": [
    {
      "clause_id": "3.2.1",
      "chapter": "第三章",
      "requirement_text": "要求原文摘要",
      "category": "资格|技术|商务|格式",
      "mandatory_flag": true,
      "scoring_link": "评分项编号或空",
      "risk_level": "高|中|低",
      "source_location": "章节+条号"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

## WORKFLOW

| Step | Action | Output | Check |
|------|--------|--------|-------|
| 1 | 按章节顺序扫描招标文件 | 条款列表 | 无遗漏 |
| 2 | 为每条赋予 clause_id、chapter、requirement_text | 单条记录 | 原文可追溯 |
| 3 | 分类：资格/技术/商务/格式 | category | 与 01 分析一致 |
| 4 | 标 mandatory_flag（强制/废标项） | 布尔 | 与 03 强制条件对齐 |
| 5 | 关联评分项（如有） | scoring_lin
